['Calms the amygdala — lowers cortisol and stress arousal.', 'Shifts brainwaves from high-beta (overthinking) to coherent alpha (calm focus).', 'Aligns your inner state with your intentions — opens the door to synchronicity.', 'Dissolves self-centred suffering states — opens the heart to love, connection, and peace.']

['Conscious Breathing — sit comfortably, hands resting on your thighs, palms facing upward. Eyes closed. Take 8 slow, deep breaths, counting each one with the thumb touching each finger (index to pinky and back).', 'Humming Vibration — bring index finger and thumb together in Jnana Mudra. As you exhale, hum softly like a bee (Bhramari Pranayama). Repeat for 8 breaths. Feel the gentle vibration calm your nervous system.', "Settle in the Silent Pause — between each inhalation and exhalation, rest in the natural stillness. Don't force it — just witness.", 'Repeat "Aham" — with every exhalation, mentally whisper "Aham" (I am — boundless consciousness). Rest in the simple feeling of being.', 'Dissolve and Expand — visualise your body, the room, the entire universe dissolving and expanding into a limitless golden ocean of light. Feel you and existence are not separate.', 'Hold Your Intention — in this expanded state, bring your heartfelt intention to mind. Visualise it manifest. Close with deep gratitude.']

['Focus on your breath — eyes closed, sit upright. Bring your whole, undivided attention to the breath entering and leaving your nostrils.', 'Scan your inner state — notice the emotions and thoughts present right now, without trying to push them away. Ask: "What exact emotion am I feeling?" (anxiety, anger, sadness, peace…)', 'Acknowledge without judgement — gently label the emotion. No judging. No fighting. Soft awareness.', 'See where your mind is — past regrets, future worries, or self-centred chatter? Just acknowledge the state of separation.', 'Flame Visualisation — visualise a steady golden flame glowing between your eyebrows. Slowly draw it inward to the centre of your brain — let it brighten the darkness and stabilise your mind.', 'Close with a smile — let a warm, gentle smile rest on your face. One more deep breath. Feel the shift. Slowly open your eyes.']

['Fosters gratitude — shifts your gaze toward the positive.', 'Closes the day mindfully — releases accumulated tension and stress.', 'Improves sleep — calms the mind before bed.', 'Builds self-compassion — review mistakes without judgement.']

['Instant amygdala calm — de-escalates panic, anger, or agitation in three minutes.', 'Builds self-awareness — naming emotions without judgement lowers their emotional charge.', 'Strengthens focus and presence — the flame steadies a scattered mind.', 'Physiological reset — engages the parasympathetic nervous system; heart rate slows; calm returns.']
